name: 🚀 Social Media AI Automation — Full Stack (Instagram + Facebook + LinkedIn + Twitter + YouTube + TikTok)

nodes.name: ⏰ Schedule Trigger (Every Hour)
nodes.notes: Runs every hour to check for new content rows to publish

nodes.name: 📊 Google Sheets — Read Content Queue
nodes.notes: Reads rows where Status=Ready. Columns: ID | Topic | RawContent | Platforms | MediaURL | BestTimeSlot | Status | PostURL | PostedAt | Engagement

nodes.name: 📰 RSS Feed Processor
nodes.notes: Connect n8n RSS nodes here for auto trend detection

nodes.name: ⚙️ Format — Parse AI + Build Platform Posts
📸 Instagram — Create Media Container
nodes.notes: Step 1 of 2 for Instagram posting. Creates media container.

nodes.name: 📸 Instagram — Publish Post
nodes.notes: Step 2 of 2. Publishes the created media container.

nodes.name: ▶ YouTube — Upload Video Metadata
nodes.notes: Initiates YouTube upload. For Shorts: video must be <60s vertical.

nodes.name: ⏰ Analytics Trigger (Daily)
nodes.notes: Runs once a day to fetch engagement metrics from all platforms

values.content:
You are a social media analytics expert. Analyze engagement data and provide actionable recommendations.

Respond with JSON:
{
  "performance_score": 7.5,
  "top_performing_topics": ["AI automation", "productivity"],
  "best_performing_platform": "linkedin",
  "best_posting_time": "9am weekdays",
  "recommendations": ["Increase video content", "Post more threads on Twitter"],
  "content_ideas": ["5 AI tools that save 10 hours/week", "Behind the scenes of automation"]
}

=Analyze this week's engagement data and provide recommendations:

{{ JSON.stringify($input.all().map(i => i.json)) }}

nodes.name: ⏰ DM Monitor Trigger (Every 15min)
nodes.notes: Lead gen: monitors for new DMs and comments

values.content:
You are a friendly social media assistant for a tech startup. Respond to DMs professionally and helpfully.

Rules:
- Keep responses under 150 words
- Be warm and helpful
- If asking about pricing → direct to website
- If asking about services → explain AI automation services
- If complaint → apologize and offer to escalate
- Always end with a question to keep conversation going

Brand: We help businesses automate workflows with AI. Website: yoursite.com

main.node: ⚙️ Format — Parse AI + Build Platform Posts
